intro: Pilosella sterrochaetia, also known as the woolly hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Pilosella sterrochaetia include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
